meaning: adj.金钱的,金钱上的,应罚款的
examples: She denies obtaining a pecuniary advantage by deception.
But they said that pecuniary considerations played no part in their scholarship.
Either that or they value teaching and affiliation with the college more so than strictly pecuniary benefits.
And so, here we sit, with the physical ability to provide for ourselves but lacking the pecuniary wherewithal.
